name: [AT] Send Logistics, Endorsement to Ops, and Congrats Email
description: Sends the client logistics email, endorses the new VA placement to Ops through email and Slack, and sends the VA a congratulatory/start-related email using placement details from Airtable.

parameters.userId: ={{ `${$('Webhook').item.json.body.fields["MVA Pair Being Replaced Slack User ID"]}` }}

parameters.text:
=Congratulations on being selected as the *{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.fields["Role"][0] }}* for *{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.fields["Client (text)"][0] }}*! We’re thrilled to have you on board.

*A process engineer will give you a quick overview of what's next shortly.*
